title: Kanban Plan
description: Simplify the freshly modified CineTaste changes where useful, verify them, and commit everything in atomic groups with push.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Run a focused simplification pass over the current worktree, validate the touched areas, and auto-commit/push the resulting changes.

DONE.task: Review the current diff and apply a narrow simplification pass to recently modified code and docs without changing behavior.
DONE.notes: Completed with helper-based cleanup in rule_engine.py and adapter_kinoteatr.py plus a readability pass over the new planning-standard document.

DONE.task: Run the fitting checks for the modified scope, scan staged diffs for secrets, and confirm the worktree is ready for commit.
DONE.notes: Completed: pytest subset passed (133 passed, 5 deselected), secret regex scan returned clean, and .gitignore was checked for new artifacts.

DONE.task: Commit the current worktree in atomic groups, push to origin, and report the resulting commit hashes.
DONE.notes: Completed with atomic commits 187cf36 and de6f7d7 plus this closing kanban-state commit, then pushed to origin.

acceptance_criteria: A dedicated kanban exists for the simplification and commit workflow and latest points to it
Recently modified code and docs are simplified only where it improves clarity without changing behavior
Relevant tests and safety checks run successfully, including a secret scan
All current relevant changes are committed in atomic groups and pushed to origin
